name: Beefy BBQ Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Green bell pepper -- seeded and chopped
1/2 Sweet red pepper -- seeded and chopped
1 cup Kraft Hickory Smoked BBQ sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain beans in a colander and set aside.
2. Place allspice, peppercorns, and whole cloves in a spice mill or blender. Process until coarsely ground.
3. Brown the ground chuck in a six to eight quart sauce pan or large skillet. Crumble the beef with a spoon or spatula as it is cooking.
4. Drain and return the crumbled beef to the saucepan.
5. Sauté the peppers and onion with the browned, crumbled ground beef until the onion is just starting to become translucent.
6. Stir in the drained beans and BBQ sauce. Heat until it begins to bubble, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in the spice mixture and brown sugar. Reduce heat and simmer for fifteen minutes.
8. Meanwhile, preheat oven to 375 degrees.
9. Transfer beans to a suitable, oven-proof serving dish.
10. Bake, uncovered, in the oven for thirty minutes. Serve hot from the oven or allow to cool as desired.
